name: Newsletter Subscribers
description: Main newsletter list — all site visitors who opted in via the homepage or checkout flow.

name: VIP Members
description: High-value customers who joined the VIP loyalty program.

name: New Subscribers
description: Subscribers who joined in the last 30 days.
behaviorNotes: Use a warm, welcoming tone. Introduce the brand story. Avoid hard sells — focus on building trust and excitement.

name: Lapsed Customers
description: Customers who haven't purchased in 90+ days.
behaviorNotes: Re-engagement tone — remind them what they're missing. Highlight new arrivals and limited-time offers. Create urgency without being pushy.

name: High Spenders
description: VIP members with lifetime spend over $500.
behaviorNotes: Exclusive, premium tone. Emphasize early access, limited editions, and personalized recommendations. They expect to feel valued.

title: Classic Cotton Tee
description: A wardrobe essential in 100% organic cotton. Relaxed fit, pre-shrunk, available in 12 colors.

title: Slim Fit Chinos
description: Tailored slim fit in stretch cotton twill. Wrinkle-resistant and perfect for work or weekend.

title: Lightweight Puffer Jacket
description: Packable warmth for unpredictable spring weather. Water-resistant shell with recycled down fill.

title: Canvas Sneakers
description: Minimalist canvas low-tops with a cushioned insole. Goes with everything.

title: Linen Button-Down
description: Breathable pure linen with a relaxed collar. The perfect warm-weather layer.

title: Recycled Nylon Weekender Bag
description: Spacious overnight bag made from 100% recycled nylon. Zip top, padded laptop sleeve, shoe compartment.

title: Spring Sale 2026
description: Seasonal sale event featuring spring collection highlights with up to 30% off select styles.

title: New Arrivals — Spring Collection
description: Introduce the latest spring styles to VIP members with early access and exclusive picks.

title: Spring Sale — New Subscribers

prompt.goal: Welcome new subscribers with a compelling first sale offer to drive a first purchase.
prompt.keyMessage: Up to 30% off spring essentials — your first order ships free.
prompt.additionalContext: These are brand-new subscribers. Lead with the brand story, then the offer.

subject: Welcome! Your 30% spring discount is waiting
preheader: Fresh styles, free shipping, and a warm welcome.

body.headline: Welcome to the family
body.body: We're glad you're here. As a thank-you for joining, enjoy 30% off our favorite spring picks — plus free shipping on your first order.

body.headline: Our picks for you
body.body: Hand-selected essentials to kick off the season right.

body.legalText: You're receiving this because you signed up at example.com. © 2026 The Spring Store. All rights reserved.

title: Spring Sale — Win-Back

prompt.goal: Re-engage lapsed customers with a time-limited spring sale to drive a repeat purchase.
prompt.keyMessage: We miss you — come back for 30% off new spring arrivals before they sell out.
prompt.additionalContext: Haven't purchased in 90+ days. Remind them of what they loved, then introduce what's new.

subject: We miss you — 30% off just for you
preheader: Come back and see what's new this spring.

body.headline: It's been a while
body.body: We noticed you haven't stopped by lately. A lot has changed — new styles, new colors, and a spring sale just for you. Take 30% off and rediscover your favorites.

body.headline: Trending right now
body.body: Don't miss these customer favorites before they sell out.

body.legalText: You're receiving this because you previously purchased from example.com. © 2026 The Spring Store. All rights reserved.

title: New Arrivals — VIP Early Access

prompt.goal: Give VIP high spenders exclusive early access to the spring collection to reward loyalty and drive premium purchases.
prompt.keyMessage: You get first dibs — shop the spring collection 48 hours before everyone else.
prompt.additionalContext: These are our best customers. Make them feel special. Highlight limited editions and premium pieces.

subject: VIP early access: Spring collection is here

body.headline: You're first in line
body.body: As one of our most valued members, you get exclusive early access to the spring collection. These pieces drop publicly on Friday — but they're yours now.

body.headline: Editor's picks
body.body: Our style team's top selections from the new collection.

body.legalText: You're receiving this as a VIP member of The Spring Store. © 2026 The Spring Store. All rights reserved.

title: New Arrivals — General Announcement

prompt.goal: Announce the spring collection launch to the full VIP list after the early-access window closes.
prompt.keyMessage: The spring collection is live — shop the freshest styles of the season.
prompt.additionalContext: Broader audience within VIP list. Less exclusive tone than the early-access email, but still premium.

subject: Just dropped: the spring collection
preheader: Fresh styles for a new season — shop now.

body.headline: Spring is served
body.body: The wait is over. Our spring collection is now live with new colors, lighter fabrics, and styles built for the season ahead.

body.headline: Bestsellers so far
body.body: These styles are already flying off the shelves.

body.legalText: You're receiving this as a member of The Spring Store. © 2026 The Spring Store. All rights reserved.
